description_long: This house is a modern, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a prominent cylindrical tower element, surrounded by a dense arrangement of tall and medium-sized trees. The exterior walls appear to be clad in light-colored siding, with large rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The cylindrical tower, likely serving as an architectural focal point or lookout, features a wraparound window band near the top. The house is set on a green lawn, with the landscaping providing privacy and a natural buffer from the surroundings. The roof is flat and likely accessible, with minimal overhangs and clean, geometric lines. The overall design suggests a contemporary architectural style with an emphasis on integration with the natural environment.
description: A modern house with a flat roof, light siding, and a distinctive cylindrical tower, surrounded by tall trees and greenery. Large windows and clean lines define its contemporary style.
description_view_0: The front facade shows the main rectangular volume, the cylindrical tower partially visible behind trees, and a prominent tall tree at the corner.
description_view_1: The cylindrical tower is most visible here, surrounded by dense trees, with the main house volume partially obscured.
description_view_2: The rear or side of the house is visible, showing the flat roof, more windows, and the cylindrical tower peeking through the trees.
description_view_3: A corner view highlights the cylindrical tower, flat roof, and the integration of the house with the surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal overhang, no visible porch, and surrounded by landscaping and trees.
